title: fix(server): serialize plain JSON Schema tool schemas
summary: Fixes #13909 where getSerializedAgentTools in @mastra/server would call zodToJsonSchema on tool schemas that are already plain JSON Schema objects (e.g. Composio tools), causing those tools to disappear in Studio. The fix replaces the complex multi-branch serialization logic with core's existing asJsonSchema helper (which handles Zod, AI SDK wrappers, and plain JSON Schema uniformly) and adds a resolveLazySchema function to unwrap function-backed schemas first. Also re-exports asJsonSchema from @mastra/core/utils/zod-to-json and bumps the server's peer dependency minimum to @mastra/core >=1.10.1. Includes a regression test for plain JSON Schema serialization and two changesets.
maintainerNotes: Well-scoped fix from a maintainer. The core change is minimal (just a re-export of the already-existing asJsonSchema from stream/base/schema.ts). The server-side change is a net simplification: ~45 lines of repetitive multi-branch schema handling replaced with ~20 lines using asJsonSchema. CI has some failures but they appear to be in unrelated suites (Combined store Tests, Observability Tests, Full Test Suite). The Lint check also fails — worth verifying if it's related. CodeRabbit suggested adding a lazy-schema test case which would strengthen coverage. The peer dependency bump to @mastra/core >=1.10.1 is notable and should be verified as correct.
